title: neltuma glandulosa
intro: Neltuma glandulosa, also known as the glandular neltuma, is a type of flowering plant native to South America, particularly in the tropical regions of the Andes mountains. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Neltuma glandulosa include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
